mapper.select: /* adm-role-applicationbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstAp */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,APKEY ,APNM FROM TADMIN_MST_AP WHERE ISOFFLINE = 'N'

/* adm-role-applicationbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectApplicationByRole */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,B.APKEY ,A.APNM ,B.ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_AP A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ROXAPGT B ON A.APKEY = B.APKEY WHERE B.ROKEY = #{rokey}
